sections.heading: Our Story
sections.body: Geet Bahar Musical Group is a registered and government-approved cultural organization based in Deoghar, Jharkhand. Founded by Uttam Kumar, we have been dedicated to preserving and promoting classical and folk music traditions while adapting to contemporary tastes.

sections.heading: Our Mission
sections.body: To bring world-class musical performances and cultural awareness programs to every corner of Jharkhand, fostering appreciation for traditional arts while supporting government initiatives in public outreach and social development.

sections.heading: Our Experience
sections.body: With years of experience in organizing orchestras, cultural festivals, and government awareness programs, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional performances that engage, educate, and inspire audiences across all demographics.

services.title: Our Services
services.intro: We specialize in large-scale performances, cultural programs, and government initiatives

services.name: Shravani Mela Programs
services.description: Grand orchestral performances during the annual Shravani Mela festival, featuring classical and folk music traditions.

services.name: Jan Sanchar (Mass Communication)
services.description: Government-approved awareness programs focused on public communication, health, education, and social development.

services.name: Nukkad Natak (Street Plays)
services.description: Engaging street performances conveying important social messages and government policies to communities.

services.name: Private Event Orchestras
services.description: Customized musical performances for weddings, corporate events, celebrations, and private gatherings.

services.name: Cultural Training
services.description: Mentorship and training programs for aspiring musicians and performers in traditional and classical arts.

services.name: Event Management
services.description: Complete event management services including sound, lighting, staging, and logistics for cultural programs.

faq.question: How do I book Geet Bahar for an event?
faq.answer: You can submit an inquiry through our contact form, email us at info@geetbahar.com, or call us directly. We'll respond within 24 hours with availability and pricing details.

faq.question: What is the minimum duration for a performance?
faq.answer: Minimum duration depends on the event type. Private events typically require 2-3 hours, while government programs can be customized. Contact us for specific requirements.

faq.question: Do you provide sound and lighting equipment?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide professional sound systems, lighting, and stage setup for most events. Additional charges may apply for specialized requirements.

faq.question: Can you perform at outdoor venues?
faq.answer: Absolutely! We have experience with outdoor performances and festivals. We can adapt to various venue conditions with proper planning.

faq.question: Are your rates negotiable for large events?
faq.answer: We offer competitive pricing and can discuss package deals for large-scale government programs and events. Contact us for a customized quote.
